policy.summary: External signals are stored as short evidence terms only. Raw page text, review bodies, ratings, photos, social posts, and user-generated comments are not stored.
policy.runtimeUse: Recommendation runtime uses generated external_signals.json only. It does not fetch external pages or call an LLM/API.
policy.collectionScope: Incremental manually reviewed source registry for external recommendation signals. Sources should prefer official sites, official tourism pages, or neutral public directories.
